Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Boomloom: Think with your hands 54 upvotes, 5 comments
  2. The paddle wheel aircraft carriers of Lake Michigan 57 upvotes, 6 comments
  3. Electronics for Kids, 2nd Edition 119 upvotes, 18 comments
  4. Show HN: Termcraft – terminal-first 2D sandbox survival in Rust 97 upvotes, 15 comments
  5. Show HN: Atomic – Self-hosted, semantically-connected personal knowledge base 63 upvotes, 9 comments
  6. ZJIT removes redundant object loads and stores 78 upvotes, 13 comments
  7. Sandboxing: Foolproof Boundaries vs. Unbounded Foolishness (2025) 11 upvotes, 0 comments
  8. Floci – A free, open-source local AWS emulator 83 upvotes, 18 comments
  9. Meta's Omnilingual MT for 1,600 Languages 120 upvotes, 32 comments
  10. Some things just take time 541 upvotes, 181 comments
  11. Bayesian statistics for confused data scientists 65 upvotes, 15 comments
  12. Common Lisp Development Tooling 48 upvotes, 10 comments
  13. The Three Pillars of JavaScript Bloat 40 upvotes, 8 comments
  14. Professional video editing, right in the browser with WebGPU and WASM 163 upvotes, 51 comments
  15. Grafeo – A fast, lean, embeddable graph database built in Rust 196 upvotes, 64 comments
  16. Hide macOS Tahoe's Menu Icons 126 upvotes, 41 comments
  17. Trivy ecosystem supply chain briefly compromised 37 upvotes, 10 comments
  18. How Ford burned $12B in Brazil (2021) 38 upvotes, 11 comments
  19. Do Not Turn Child Protection into Internet Access Control 542 upvotes, 284 comments
  20. Ant Mill 10 upvotes, 1 comments
  21. Tinybox – Offline AI device 120B parameters 360 upvotes, 219 comments
  22. A digital resource for studying the graffiti of Herculaneum and Pompeii 5 upvotes, 0 comments
  23. Thinking Fast, Slow, and Artificial: How AI Is Reshaping Human Reasoning 99 upvotes, 58 comments
  24. Books of the Century by Le Monde 104 upvotes, 64 comments
  25. How Invisalign became the biggest user of 3D printers 143 upvotes, 102 comments
  26. Desperately Seeking Space Friends 4 upvotes, 0 comments
  27. The Impact of AI on Game Dev Jobs. Open to Work Crisis 57 upvotes, 38 comments
  28. Why craft-lovers are losing their craft 59 upvotes, 41 comments
  29. Chest Fridge (2009) 44 upvotes, 32 comments
  30. Ubuntu 26.04 Ends 46 Years of Silent sudo Passwords 325 upvotes, 334 comments

Last generated 11:30am, 22 March 2026. Source here.
